items.name: theme
items.title: Aqua Theme
items.description: Mac OS X era palette and typography for shadcn/ui projects.

theme.font-sans: 'Lucida Grande', 'Lucida Sans Unicode', 'Helvetica Neue', Verdana, sans-serif

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: The iChat buddy icon: photo, initials over a gel color, or the classic generic silhouette.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Soft gradient notice panel in note, caution and stop flavors.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Aqua context menu: white panel, gel highlight, checkable items and submenus.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Etched form label in classic panel typography.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Glossy round radios that fill with gel and a white pip when selected.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multi-line Aqua text well with an inset shadow and blue focus halo.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Tinted capsule label in blue, glossy gray and red.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Glossy Aqua pill button with gel highlight, in blue, capsule and red.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Aqua tab bar with glossy active state over a pinstripe content pane.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: The classic Aqua text field: white well with an inset shadow and blue focus halo.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Glossy square that fills with blue gel when checked.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Gel toggle with a polished metal thumb.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: The Aqua popup button: glossy capsule with a gel arrow box, menu with gel highlight.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: iTunes volume slider: groove track, blue gel range, polished knob.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: The Aqua alert panel: soft gradient sheet with a deep drop shadow.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: The iconic striped blue barber-pole progress bar.

items.name: ipod
items.title: iPod
items.description: The classic iPod: white shell, LCD screen and a working click wheel.

items.name: window
items.title: Window
items.description: Brushed metal window chrome with traffic lights and a titlebar.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: The translucent shelf: magnifying items, hover labels and running indicators.

items.name: chat-bubble
items.title: Chat Bubble
items.description: iChat gradient bubbles with sculpted tails, in blue and orange.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Dock-style label tooltip: dark translucent capsule with white text.
